payload.title: Audit Committee Book
payload.description: MTA Audit Committee meeting materials including draft 2021 audited financial statements for MTA consolidated, NYC Transit, LIRR, Metro-North, MTA Bus, TBTA, SIRTOA, and FMTAC, plus investment compliance report and open audit recommendations

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA systemwide ridership increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Preliminary MTA system-wide utilization through the fourth quarter of 2021 has rebounded past the depths experienced in 2020, with ridership up by 257.3 million trips (27.0%) over the 2020 ridership level.

tool_args.label: MTA NYC Transit subway ridership increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: MTA New York City Transit subway ridership increased by 120.4 million trips (18.8%)

tool_args.label: MTA NYC Transit bus ridership increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: MTA New York City Transit bus increased by 103.0 million trips (49.3%) in 2021

tool_args.label: MTA Bus ridership increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Bus increased by 25.5 million trips (55.5%) in 2021

tool_args.label: LIRR ridership increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Long Island Rail Road ridership increased by 4.7 million trips (15.6%) in 2021

tool_args.label: Metro-North ridership increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Metro-North Railroad increased by 3.5 million trips (13.0%) in 2021

tool_args.label: Staten Island Railway ridership increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Staten Island Railway increased by 42 thousand trips (3.0%) in 2021

tool_args.label: MTA Bridges and Tunnels crossings increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Vehicle traffic at MTA Bridges and Tunnels facilities in 2021 increased by 54.1 million crossings (21.4%) compared with crossings during 2020.

tool_args.label: Subway ridership as percentage of pre-pandemic (Nov 2021)
tool_args.raw_text: As of the first week in November, ridership recovery as a percentage of pre-pandemic levels was 55 percent on Subways

tool_args.label: Bus ridership as percentage of pre-pandemic (Nov 2021)
tool_args.raw_text: ridership recovery as a percentage of pre-pandemic levels was ... 64 percent on Buses

tool_args.label: SIR, LIRR, MNR ridership as % of pre-pandemic (Nov 2021)
tool_args.raw_text: As of the first week in November, ridership recovery as a percentage of pre-pandemic levels was ... 40 percent on SIR, 52 percent on LIRR and 48 percent on MNR.

payload.raw_value_text: 40 percent on SIR, 52 percent on LIRR and 48 percent on MNR

tool_args.label: B&T crossings as % of pre-pandemic (Nov 2021)
tool_args.raw_text: Traffic on B&T crossings was at 97 percent of the pre-pandemic crossing level.

tool_args.label: McKinsey projected new normal ridership level
tool_args.raw_text: The McKinsey projections anticipate a 'new normal' ridership level of between 82% and 91% of pre-pandemic levels by the first quarter of 2024

tool_args.label: B&T traffic full recovery projection
tool_args.raw_text: B&T traffic is expected to fully recover to its pre-pandemic level by the second quarter of 2022.

payload.raw_value_text: fully recover to its pre-pandemic level

issues: metric_claim payload with raw_value_text should include normalized numeric value or value_min/value_max

tool_args.label: 2020-2024 Capital Program total
tool_args.raw_text: 2020-2024 Capital program totaling $54.8 was approved by the MTA Board on September 25, 2019. ... On December 15, 2021, a Letter Amendment was submitted to the Board that increased the total funding for the 2020-2024 Capital Program to $55.3 billion.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company total operating expenses 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Total operating expenses $881,039 (in thousands) for 2021

tool_args.label: B&T traffic full recovery projection Q2 2022
tool_args.raw_text: B&T traffic is expected to fully recover to its pre-pandemic level by the second quarter of 2022.

tool_args.label: Subway and bus service scheduled at 100% of pre-pandemic levels
tool_args.raw_text: Subway and bus service are scheduled at 100 percent of pre-pandemic levels with expectations of meeting that schedule daily

payload.claim_text: Subway and bus service are scheduled at 100 percent of pre-pandemic levels with expectations of meeting that schedule daily
payload.description: NYC Subway and bus service restored to full pre-pandemic scheduled levels as of late 2021

tool_args.label: MTA expected to receive $6.1 billion from ARPA
tool_args.raw_text: MTA is expected to receive approximately $6.1 billion in federal aid from ARPA in 2022

payload.claim_text: MTA is expected to receive approximately $6.1 billion in federal aid from ARPA in 2022
payload.description: Federal aid through the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021

tool_args.label: CARES Act provided $4.0 billion to MTA
tool_args.raw_text: The CARES Act, through the Federal Transit Administration's formula funding provisions provided $4.0 billion to MTA.

payload.claim_text: The CARES Act provided $4.0 billion to MTA through FTA formula funding provisions
payload.description: Federal COVID-19 emergency aid signed into law March 27, 2020

tool_args.label: MTA received $4.1 billion from CRRSAA
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA received $4.1 billion in aid from the CRRSAA between December 2021 ($0.6 billion) and January 2022 ($3.5 billion).

payload.claim_text: The MTA received $4.1 billion in aid from the CRRSAA between December 2021 ($0.6 billion) and January 2022 ($3.5 billion)
payload.description: Coronavirus Response and Relief Supplemental Appropriations Act of 2021

tool_args.label: NYC Subway resumed 24-hour service May 17, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: MTA New York City Subway resumed 24 hours a day service on May 17, 2021, after subway service was shut down overnight for over a year to allow for thorough disinfecting of the system and other enhancements.

payload.claim_text: MTA New York City Subway resumed 24 hours a day service on May 17, 2021, after subway service was shut down overnight for over a year
payload.description: 24-hour subway service restored after overnight shutdown during pandemic

tool_args.label: NYC Transit farebox revenue 2021 vs 2020 change
tool_args.raw_text: The net increase in current liabilities was mainly due to an increase in MTA loan of $800, ... a decrease in unredeemed farecards and tokens liabilities of $73, due to the significant decrease in ridership and MetroCard usage in 2020

payload.scope: Superstorm Sandy FTA emergency relief funding

tool_args.label: LIRR operates at 87% pre-pandemic service level
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Long Island Rail Road currently operates on an 87% pre-pandemic service level.

payload.claim_text: MTA Long Island Rail Road currently operates on an 87% pre-pandemic service level
payload.description: LIRR service as percentage of pre-pandemic level

tool_args.label: Metro-North operates at 89% pre-pandemic weekday service
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Metro-North Railroad currently operates on an 89% pre-pandemic service level during the week and 100% on weekends relative to pre-pandemic levels.

payload.claim_text: MTA Metro-North Railroad currently operates on an 89% pre-pandemic service level during the week and 100% on weekends relative to pre-pandemic levels
payload.description: Metro-North service as percentage of pre-pandemic level

tool_args.label: Superstorm Sandy FTA emergency relief funding allocated to MTA
tool_args.raw_text: The total allocation of emergency relief funding from the Federal Transit Administration to MTA in connection with Superstorm Sandy to date is $5.83 billion

tool_args.label: MTA Bus operating expense increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Total operating expenses increased by $43.2 million or 5.2% versus the prior year

tool_args.label: MTA Bus fuel cost increase 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Fuel costs increased by $9.6 million or 68.6%, due to higher prices and the resumption of bus service that was previously reduced due to the Coronavirus pandemic.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus ridership increase 55.9% 2021 vs 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Public liability and no fault claims increased by $24.5 million. This resulted from increased exposure as ridership increased by 55.9% in 2021 vs 2020.
